title: Hash Tables, Dictionaries, Sets, and Collision Policy · Invariant Lens: Collision Resolution
summary: Create a deduplication and lookup service that remains correct under collision-heavy data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa collision resolution increment in a hash-table model and workload benchmark. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace separate chaining and open addressing through collision and deletion cases.
Relate hash stability, equality, and immutable key requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
